summary: Comprehensive testing completed for BareForce One cinematic website iteration 2 with major UI overhaul. Excellent results across all features including new CSS-only animations, horizontal scrolling testimonials, animated counters, gradient text effects, glow card hovers, and Palantir-inspired design elements. Both frontend and backend functionality verified successfully.
passed_tests: Backend /api/health endpoint returns healthy status (100% success)
Contact form POST /api/contact with proper validation works perfectly
Input validation now properly rejects invalid data (fixed from iteration 1)
CORS headers properly configured
Home page loads with cinematic hero section, gradient text, parallax background
Dual CTAs in hero section (View Capabilities, Start a Project) functional
Trust bar displays 5 trust items correctly
Stats counter section shows 4 animated numbers using CountUp component
Audience cards with Palantir-style numbering (/0.1, /0.2, /0.3) link correctly to pages
Capabilities section displays 6 cards with glow hover effect working
Why BFO section shows 4 pillars with proper styling
Case study cards with metric headers display correctly
Testimonials horizontal scrolling section with CSS animation works perfectly
Final CTA section with gradient text effects functional
All page routes work: /government, /enterprise, /local-business, /capabilities, /case-studies, /about, /contact
Contact form integration works - shows success message after submission
Footer displays UEI (FJRRJ6JNJ375), company info, location details
Mobile menu toggle works correctly on mobile viewport
CSS-based animations and effects: 7 gradient text elements, 2 scanline overlays, 2 grid textures
Palantir-inspired design elements implemented throughout
Scroll animations and reveal effects CSS classes properly applied

success_percentage.backend: 100% (4/4 tests passed - validation issue from iteration 1 fixed)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all UI elements, animations, interactions, and navigation working)
